text: I am surrounded by smooth surfaces, sharp lines, and a cool artificial light that wraps everything in an ethereal glow. Peering through the glass, I catch the luminous blue rectangle inside, a symbol of technology's omnipresence. My reflection is mingled with the room beyond; I feel both part of and separate from what I see. Entering further, the text on the wall makes me pause: it speaks to curiosity, connection, and the dynamic dance between nature and construction. I am thoughtful, somewhat inspired—here is an intersection between knowledge and artifice, inviting me to question how I connect with the world and with others.
